title: VulkanVitalised
description: An ultra-optimised modpack delivering maximum FPS, vitalised with clean shader support, compatible with VulkanMod
body:
# _VulkanVitalised_
![VulkanVitalised Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b67edb66d488371a250fd843ff6f2f7db6eac0c.png)
## _The Most Versatile Vulkan ModPack_
**This modpack incorporates maximum PvP output, optimised performance built on Vulkan rendering while also having stunning visuals on standby thanks to [**Beryl**](https://modrinth.com/mod/beryl); a new [**Vulkan**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vulkanmod) based and optimized shader pipeline to enhance graphics with low performance impact.**

> _**_The following mods will only work if in a **single player world** / **installed on a server**:_**_
- [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
- [Let Me Despawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/lmd)
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisiumforked)
- [ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/4WWQxlQP)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat)

![Available for Fabric Sticker](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcdn.jsdelivr.net%2Fnpm%2F%40intergrav%2Fdevins-badges%403%2Fassets%2Fcozy%2Fsupported%2Ffabric_vector.svg&n=-1)

[**_Incompatible Mods_**](https://github.com/xCollateral/VulkanMod/wiki/Incompatible-mods) -  mods that make direct calls to OpenGL might crash the game.

**_Note for ReplayMod:_** **Recording the gameplay with VulkanMod enabled is completely fine**, but from my testing, you have to disable VulkanMod when trying to edit the replay.
